name: Low-Fat Oatmeal Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Raisins or any dried fruit, cut in small pieces
1 Egg or 2 egg whites or 1/4 cup Egg substitute
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees and spray a muffin tin with cooking spray.
2. In a bowl, mix the first six ingredients and dump onto a paper plate.
3. In the same bowl, mix the remaining ingredients and let sit for 5 minutes.
4. Stir in the previously mixed dry ingredients until completely mixed.
5. Fill muffin cups almost full.
6. Bake for 20 to 22 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into a muffin comes out clean.
7. Remove muffins from pan and cool on a wire rack.
